constants.quoted_text: AUTHORITY: PP-684 (this doc); supersedes legacy "Reason / Continuity" Conviction labels and per-character anachronistic philosophical-tradition labels.

**Self-Other orientation** is a separate, orthogonal axis tracking whom an actor primarily benefits — themselves vs the broader populace. Greed, ambition, altruism, and self-sacrifice are represented along this axis, not as Convictions.
Magnitudes are calibrated within `[-1, +1]`. A value near 0 indicates the Conviction is largely orthogonal to that axis. Magnitudes near ±1 indicate strong polarity.

constants.value: 5th-axis allowance Class B if Community/Identity collapse
